arts.ttl: Arsenal's Martin Zubimendi transfer set to see two Gunners stars pushed towards exit door
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly closing in on a deal for Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi and two further deals could be unlocked once he arrives at the Emirates Stadium

arts.ttl: How Arsenal will line up with Martin Zubimendi
arts.sum: However, Bukayo Saka, Kai Havertz and Gabriel Martinelli will remain Arteta’s preferred attack if the Gunners aren’t able to add to their forward roster. Arsenal are reportedly close to finalising an agreement to sign Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi this summer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal in ‘advanced talks’ to sign Real Sociedad star
arts.sum: Premier League giants Arsenal are on the verge of closing a deal for a leading member of the midfield ranks at Real Sociedad. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano,…
